response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with a strong general software background, but the profile does not match this embedded security/networking role. Native-level Japanese is a hard requirement and is absent (only English, Romanian, and basic German listed). C experience is limited to roughly six months on a desktop IDE (LabWindows/CVI) rather than UNIX/embedded systems development, and there is no evidence of Linux kernel source modification, LAN-switch firmware, or the required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, MAC authentication) or L2/L3 networking depth. The bulk of the experience is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms, which is tangential to this position.
strengths: Deep, varied software engineering experience (10+ years) with strong TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and Linux/C++ embedded-style projects
Demonstrated ability to learn new domains quickly and ship across stacks
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency (a stated hard requirement)
No Linux kernel investigation/source-modification or embedded firmware/LAN-switch experience
No demonstrated security (MACsec, 802.1X) or L2/L3 networking expertise; C use is minimal and dated
